message:
fix: polish core components with fluid typography and touch device detection

Comprehensive component improvements for better responsiveness, accessibility,
and mobile experience:

hero.tsx:
- Replace fixed text sizes with clamp() for fluid hero headline scaling
- Adjust highlight badge text size for consistency

section-shell.tsx:
- Apply fluid typography to section headings using clamp()
- Increase eyebrow text size from 10px to 12px for readability

site-header.tsx:
- Increase location text from 10px to 12px minimum
- Increase keyboard shortcut badge text for clarity

project-card.tsx:
- Add touch device detection via (hover: none) media query
- Disable spotlight mouse effect on touch devices (performance)
- Add active:scale-[0.98] for tactile feedback on mobile
- Reduce padding on mobile (p-4) with larger padding on desktop (p-6, p-8)
- Enhanced star badge with gradient background and shimmer animation
- Increase tag text size from 10px to 12px

easter-eggs.tsx:
- Fix hydration issues with SSR-safe console logging
- Use requestAnimationFrame to defer console output
- Replace template literal approach with console.group for reliability
- Add try-catch for error resilience

stats-grid.tsx, timeline.tsx:
- Minor text size adjustments for consistency

All changes respect the 12px minimum text size for accessibility while
maintaining visual hierarchy through weight, color, and spacing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
